Package io.vertigo.social.plugins.sms.ovh

Interface OvhSmsWebServiceClient

All Superinterfaces:
io.vertigo.core.node.component.Amplifier, io.vertigo.core.node.component.CoreComponent
@PathPrefix("/1.0") public interface OvhSmsWebServiceClient extends io.vertigo.core.node.component.Amplifier

  • Method Details

    • sendSms

      @AnonymousAccessAllowed @SessionLess @POST("/sms/{serviceName}/jobs/") Map sendSms(@PathParam("serviceName") String serviceName, @InnerBodyParam("sender") String sender, @InnerBodyParam("receivers") List<String> receivers, @InnerBodyParam("message") String message, @InnerBodyParam("noStopClause") boolean noStopClause)

    • smsServiceSenders

    • createSender
